field_catalog.context: QB and coaching diagnostic context; coordinator continuity and ATS/O-U fields remain placeholders.
field_catalog.defense: Existing allowed/created advanced metrics from weekly_advanced_metrics_v1 plus lagged havoc created from 2025 advanced season stats.
field_catalog.future_consumers: Team Capsules, Matchup Sheets, Weekly Narratives, Recommendation explanations, Slack summaries, dashboards, and web/mobile should read this dataset.
field_catalog.identity: Team, conference, power rating, national rank, returning production, projected wins placeholder, SOS proxy, style, and pace.
field_catalog.offense: Existing advanced team metrics from weekly_advanced_metrics_v1 plus lagged havoc allowed from 2025 advanced season stats.
